title: polypodium laeve
intro: Polypodium laeve, also known as American polypody or common polypody, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Polypodium laeve include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting respiratory health. The plant is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
